headline: Autodesk’s MaintainX Deal Expands Operations Focus While Shares Trade Lower
summary: Autodesk agreed to acquire MaintainX for $3.6b in cash, its largest deal to date. The acquisition is intended to expand Autodesk beyond design into operations and maintenance workflows. MaintainX will sit within the new Autodesk Operations Solutions division, focused on factory and facility operations. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ADSK, this deal comes at a time when the stock has faced pressure, with shares down 4.0% over the past week and 5.3% over the past month. At a current share...
